title: No Such Thing As A Second-Placed Helmet
content:
This week's show, fully ad-free!

Zoe Lyons joins Dan, James and Andy to discuss road runners, sharks and Eddie the Eagle.

Visit nosuchthingasafish.com for news about live shows, merchandise and more episodes.
